[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. [Custom Banners](https://www.banners.com/banners) 3. Custom Birthday Banners # Custom Birthday Banners: Big Impact for Your Celebration **Personalized Birthday Banner** ![5th Birthday Eva - Birthday Banner | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/50232ae60bc649deba792be78cfa43d6.jpg) * [Product Overview](#2fcad3a6-d630-4973-9a32-342897ee5b86) * [Material Options](#8ab8a5de-ba40-4345-b435-2f45682dc0e5) * [Finishing Options](#0968c789-18fb-4d4b-91cc-2d5e36947734) * [Artwork Specs](#6384d776-b224-4c21-a377-90d0d6d340fd) * [Production Times](#9a7800bc-5f59-4c63-92b4-e37286dd4f24) * [Payment Options](#ba3da710-edff-4261-a757-922c1d6f5ca6) * [Shipping Guidelines](#e90a1c7b-3de0-4f14-8c61-332f8506cbb7) ## Custom Birthday Banners Make an unforgettable first impression with a custom birthday banner you can be proud of. All birthday banners are made with a 13 oz woven fiber material that provides increased strength and durability to withstand outdoor conditions and look beautiful while hanging. You can customize your banner with one of our free templates, have our team of designers create it for you, or upload your own artwork. You can also choose from several finishing options for a birthday banner or sign that meets all your needs, including reinforced hems or pole pockets Our state-of-the-art production facility can accommodate orders of 1 to 1,000+ banners and vinyl signs. We're the trusted experts in banner printing and we can help you make a statement at your next event. Get started below to put your message on display with a high-quality custom banner that you can't wait to hang. ### Birthday Banners Materials Your banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA. Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application. **13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners** Our high-quality 13oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut. **13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners** Our high-quality 13oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give it a high end look. **18 oz Vinyl Banners** Our extra heavy duty matte 18oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality. **Mesh Banners** Made with 8oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh Banners are ideal for outdoor and windy conditions. **Fabric Banners** Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor displays and has a low shine that produces a high end look and feel. **Adhesive Banners** Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained. Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces. [**Click here to request a sam
